hero.title: Online library
hero.desc: Next-generation Smart Digital Library — opening the door to knowledge in the digital era.

f1.title: Automated Digital Card & RFID
f1.desc: The integrated identity service automatically issues personalized QR-code library cards in just 3 seconds. Supports OTP verification, dynamic security QR codes that change continuously to prevent fraud, and syncs with school RFID physical cards.

f2.title: Smart Search & Book Recommendations
f2.desc: Uses reading-behavior analysis algorithms to deliver accurate personalized book recommendations. Instant full-text search in milliseconds, suggestions based on favorite topics and borrowing history, real-time multi-level catalog management.

f3.title: Ultra-fast Loans & API Gateway
f3.desc: SmartLib.NET is built on a powerful Microservices architecture. Place book loan requests online, auto-sync via RabbitMQ Event Bus, and pick up books at the counter with a super-fast QR code. All routed through a secure API Gateway.

step1.d: Create an account with your email or school account

step2.d: Find books by title, author, or genre

step3.d: Select a book and confirm your loan request online

step4.d: Receive notifications and manage your loan schedule

why.card_3s_d: No queuing, no paperwork. Digital library cards are issued automatically right after registration.
why.search_d: Millisecond full-text search across 12,000+ books. Smart suggestions based on reading history.
why.anywhere_d: Access from phone, tablet, or laptop. Real-time data synchronization.
why.security_d: JWT authentication, dynamic anti-fraud QR codes, multi-layer permission system.
why.auto_d: Book return reminders, auto-renewal, new book notifications — no manual action needed.
why.report_d: Visual dashboard for admins. Track reading trends, popular books, and active members.

core.goal_d: Digitize the entire traditional library system, making knowledge more accessible to users everywhere, anytime.
core.mission_d: Become Vietnam's leading digital library platform, connecting millions of readers to a rich knowledge base.
core.vision_d: Build a comprehensive digital learning ecosystem, integrating AI to personalize the reading experience for every reader.
core.value_d: Transparent, dedicated, continuously innovating, and always putting readers' community interests first.

cards.search_d: Find books by title, author, or genre — instant results with Full-text Search.
cards.borrow_d: Request from anywhere, get notified when the book is ready for pickup.
cards.digital_card_d: Issue a personalized QR-coded library card in just 3 seconds.
cards.notify_d: Return reminders, new book alerts via email and SMS.
cards.report_d: Real-time book and reading trend statistics.
cards.admin_d: Comprehensive dashboard for administrators and librarians.
cards.jwt_d: Multi-layer permissions with JWT for data security.
cards.micro_d: Modern architecture with API Gateway and RabbitMQ Event Bus.
cards.multiplatform_d: Access anytime on PC, phone, or tablet.

timeline.2020_d: SmartLib founded with the goal of digitalizing university libraries nationwide.
timeline.2021_d: Deployed at 5 universities with over 1,000 users.
timeline.2022_d: 50+ library partners nationwide with 20,000 registered members.
timeline.2023_d: Launched smart book recommendations and AI-powered document summaries.
timeline.2024_d: Received Outstanding Digital Transformation Award from the Ministry of Information & Communication.

steps.register_d: Fill in personal info, verify email in 1 minute.
steps.card_d: Your personalized QR-coded library card is issued automatically.
steps.borrow_d: Search for books, click borrow, and choose your pickup date.
steps.return_d: Pick up at the counter with your QR code, return on time to avoid fines.

guide.login_c: Go to the site and click "Login" in the top right. Choose your role and enter your credentials.
guide.login_tip: First-time login requires you to change the default password for security.
guide.search_c: Use the search bar to find books by title, author, or category. Click a title to view details and borrow.
guide.search_tip: Each member can borrow up to 5 books at a time.
guide.renew_c: Go to "Borrow History" in your account to renew before the due date.
guide.renew_tip: Each book can be renewed up to 2 times, 7 days each. Must renew at least 1 day before due.
guide.notify_c: The system automatically sends reminders via email and SMS. You can customize notification types.
guide.notify_tip: Enable book return reminders 3 days in advance to avoid fines.
guide.history_c: Your personal dashboard shows all borrow/return history, favorites, and smart reading suggestions.
guide.history_tip: The AI system analyzes reading history to suggest the most relevant books for you.
guide.security_c: Protect your account with a strong password and never share your login info.
guide.security_tip: Library card QR codes change every 24 hours to prevent fraud.

rules.duration_d: Default 14 days per loan. Can be renewed up to 2 times.
rules.quantity_d: Maximum 5 books at a time per member.
rules.fine_d: 2,000 VND/day/book starting from the due date.
rules.card_d: Library card is valid for 1 year from the registration date.
rules.condition_d: Damaged or lost books must be compensated at market price.

tips.preborrow_d: Reserve before visiting the library to ensure the book is available.
tips.wishlist_d: Bookmark books you want to read so you don't miss them when returned.
tips.mobile_d: Access on your phone to manage anywhere, anytime.
tips.notify_d: Receive automatic return reminders so you never forget.
tips.ai_d: The AI system recommends books based on your reading history.
tips.early_d: Renew 3 days in advance to avoid losing borrow privileges.
tips.stats_d: See how many books you've read each month in the dashboard.
tips.filter_d: Use advanced filters to find exactly the right book in seconds.

faq.q1: How do I register an account?
faq.a1: Click "Register" in the top right, fill in your info and verify your email. Your digital library card will be issued automatically within 3 seconds.
faq.q2: How many books can I borrow at once?
faq.a2: Each member can borrow up to 5 books at a time. The default loan period is 14 days.
faq.q3: What is the late return fine?
faq.a3: 2,000 VND/day/book starting from the due date. You'll receive a reminder 3 days before.
faq.q4: What if I forget my password?
faq.a4: Click "Forgot Password" on the login page, enter your registered email. The system will send a reset link within minutes.
faq.q5: How long is the library card valid?
faq.a5: The card is valid for 1 year from registration. You can renew it for free up to 30 days before expiry.
faq.q6: Can I read digital documents online?
faq.a6: Yes! SmartLib has over 5,800 digital documents you can read directly in your browser or download.

reviews.sent_sub: We will reply within 24 working hours.
reviews.cta_sub: Register for free and experience the smart digital library today.
reviews.faq2_a: Absolutely! Fill the contact form with topic "Feature Request". Our product team will review and respond.
reviews.faq3_q: How long does email response take?
reviews.faq3_a: We commit to respond within 24 working hours. Urgent issues are prioritized within 2 hours.
reviews.faq4_q: Can I visit the office in person?

list.name: Nguyen Anh Tuan
list.text: I just finished registering and immediately received a beautiful virtual library card. Online renewal saves me a lot of time.

list.name: Tran Thi Mai
list.text: The report dashboard is extremely visual. I can easily view monthly borrowing charts and search for the hottest books.

list.name: Le Minh Hoang
list.text: The smart book suggestion feature is extremely useful. It always recommends exactly the topics I care about. Search speed is amazingly fast.

list.name: Pham Thu Tra
list.text: Since using SmartLib, I no longer have to wait in line. All borrow/return processes via RFID are smooth and fully automated.

list.name: Dang Quoc Bao
list.text: Stable system, modern design, and very user-friendly. I can access and borrow digital documents online anywhere without any difficulty.

list.name: Nguyen Thi Lan
list.text: Rich digital document repository, especially in art and design. Beautiful UI, easy to use. I recommend it to all my friends.
